results.title: Meet Terrance Jamison, the Bills' new family oriented defensive line coach
results.description: Hired in February as the Buffalo Bills’ defensive line coach, Jamison is making the jump to the professional level after 15 years of coaching in the collegiate ranks.

results.title: 'I thought he would be a Premier League player': What to expect from Negru
results.description: Ian Holloway managing to locate Stephan Negru’s confidence will make it a slam-dunk signing for Swindon Town, according to those who know him best

results.title: We never forgot: 5 lessons from Guilford Courthouse Battle as America celebrates 250
results.description: To fulfill this mission, Nathanael Greene implemented a unique strategy for the battle, even if it cost him.
